_comment: Real eBird bar-chart data: per-month frequency + checklist counts for all 30 hotspots. The app loads this and labels these values 'documented' (a species with no entry here falls back to the transparent habitat/season inference model, marked 'inferred'). To refresh, re-run: EBIRD_API_TOKEN=xxx node scripts/build-reference.mjs all ./csv-dir. eBird frequency is a multi-year average, so quarterly is plenty.
